channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 1st April
item.description:
The car has been here for over 7 days and has not moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Woodlea Drive, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw2 4sb - Across from here. Next to a tree., 1st April
item.description:
Dumped furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Exeter Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: St Julians Rd NW6. Top and middle of street., 1st April
item.description:
1. Dumped mattress. 2. Dumped fridge.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Julians Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tip Troughton Road, 1st April
item.description:
Bag of garden waste now added to - table, pictures and a wheelie bin. End of Troughton Road near station - usual fly tipping spot. Needs signs and camera.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st April
item.description:
Deep potholes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoskins Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken slab outside number 48., 1st April
item.description:
Broken slab outside number 48.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42, Marlborough Park Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pit empty, 1st April
item.description:
Please plant a tree in the empty spot outside 14/16 Durban Road. I have requested this every year since 2023 and each year I am told a tree will be planted before the end of the season, but this never happens. See #7169479 for my last request.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, palette and some canisters left on the road, 1st April
item.description:
People from the neighbouring houses seen dumping these items on the road, without any considerations for us living in the building. CCTV cameras urgently needed to catch the culprits in the act.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: MBRU occupying another pitch under Bridge @ Empress Street, 1st April
item.description:
These Mobile Bike Repair Units continuously alternate between parking pitches to give false sense of movement. Illegal trading under the bridge causes more noise and activity, with added echoes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins - Anstridge Path, 1st April
item.description:
The litter bins on Anstridge Path are not being emptied regularly Often the contents is spilt over I’ve seen the estate caretaker clearing up the waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anstridge Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags obstruction, 1st April
item.description:
Black bags obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed fly tipped, 1st April
item.description:
Bed flytipped by neighbour at no8 Denesmead. Half of bed taken down and collected by fly tip van. The rest was left in the hallway then taken down as soon as the fly tip van had gone so it’s now been left all week. I don’t understand why endless fly tipping from flat 8 is tolorated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal bins missing, 1st April
item.description:
The communal bins at Anstridge Road Opposite Wayfield Link are missing A resident in Anstridge Road is known uses the public bin at Anstridge Path as for his personal use and has been seen dumping rubbish next to it according to a neighbour Not sure who it is though The area where the bins are is being used by young kids to smoke weed, leave used condoms, urine and are exceptionally loud in the evenings this happens on non youth club nights as well as youth club nights Youth Club in Anstridge Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anstridge Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley, 1st April
item.description:
Abandoned trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on street outside charity shop, 1st April
item.description:
Dumped soil by the roafd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several large potholes at the junction of St Pauls wood Hill and Leesons Hill, 1st April
item.description:
This problem has got considerably worse and has now spread across the width of the junction it really should be a priority ….
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nascent Pothole, 1st April
item.description:
Whilst it's currently small - sadly we all know this is only going in one direction! Hopefully you can get the original company who dug up the road to come back and fix their fix?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Collingham Road, South Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish oue door again!!, 1st April
item.description:
Please can we get help here? Trying to keep this area clean and rubbish free? We would like to get help to stop the fly tipping that keeps happening on our doorstep.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement sinking and holes caused by fallen paving bricks, 1st April
item.description:
A hole appeared in the pavement last year from a single brick sinking. Since then more bricks have sunk down creating more holes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 366-376, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mazum Restaurant Blocking Pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Mazum Restaurant at 10 Brompton Road is blocking the pavement with its tables and chairs and a sign and these are not on their property,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Knightsbridge Green, Knightsbridge, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
